channel.title: Finance 新闻汇总 - Free News Agent
channel.description: Finance 分类的最新新闻汇总，由 Free News Agent 自动生成，Gemini AI 筛选优质内容。

item.title: Warsh’s new task forces give the Fed wiggle room to put off changing rates until December
item.description: <![CDATA[Warsh’s new task forces give the Fed wiggle room to put off changing rates until December]]>

item.title: Trump picked Kevin Warsh to cut rates. The new Fed chief just told us he has other plans.
item.description: <![CDATA[Trump picked Kevin Warsh to cut rates. The new Fed chief just told us he has other plans.]]>

item.title: Fed watching is looking very different now. Two charts can help you in the Warsh era.
item.description: <![CDATA[Fed watching is looking very different now. Two charts can help you in the Warsh era.]]>

item.title: How China’s economic comeback hit a wall
item.description: <![CDATA[How China’s economic comeback hit a wall]]>

item.title: Oil prices face fresh wave of volatility amid conflicting reports about Strait of Hormuz reopening and ongoing regional strife
item.description: <![CDATA[Oil prices face fresh wave of volatility amid conflicting reports about Strait of Hormuz reopening and ongoing regional strife]]>

item.title: Iran to seek ‘insurance fees’ for passage through Strait of Hormuz
item.description: <![CDATA[Iran to seek ‘insurance fees’ for passage through Strait of Hormuz]]>

item.title: Iran deal brings little relief for inflation-wary central banks
item.description: <![CDATA[Iran deal brings little relief for inflation-wary central banks]]>

item.title: Cuba passes ‘urgent’ reforms to liberalise economy under US pressure
item.description: <![CDATA[Cuba passes ‘urgent’ reforms to liberalise economy under US pressure]]>

item.title: ‘We are habitually frugal’: My wife and I have money. How do we help our children without ruining their independence?
item.description: <![CDATA[‘We are habitually frugal’: My wife and I have money. How do we help our children without ruining their independence?]]>

item.title: Employers to college students: Never mind that 4.0 GPA. Go out and get a summer job.
item.description: <![CDATA[Employers to college students: Never mind that 4.0 GPA. Go out and get a summer job.]]>
